
Model Comparison {data-navmenu="Comparison"}
=====================================

```{r comp_setup}
all_mv <- c(list(mv), comp_mv)
```

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Spawning Biomass

```{r comp_sb}
mv_plot_compare(
  mv_list   = all_mv,
  component = "spawning_biomass",
  ylab      = "Spawning biomass",
  title     = "Spawning Biomass Comparison"
)
```

### Legal Biomass

```{r comp_lb}
mv_plot_compare(
  mv_list   = all_mv,
  component = "legal_biomass",
  ylab      = "Legal biomass",
  title     = "Legal Biomass Comparison"
)
```

### Recruitment

```{r comp_rec}
mv_plot_compare(
  mv_list   = all_mv,
  component = "recruitment",
  ylab      = "Recruitment",
  title     = "Recruitment Comparison"
)
```

### Legal Harvest Rate

```{r comp_hr}
mv_plot_compare(
  mv_list   = all_mv,
  component = "legal_hr",
  ylab      = "Legal harvest rate",
  title     = "Legal Harvest Rate Comparison"
)
```
